case_title: FOGARTY, JOANNE et al VS CARPENETTI, CAROLYN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY FOGARTY, JOANNE ALBANESE, STACY AS TO DEFENDANT CARPENETTI, CAROLYN RIGAR PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
